name: Academy
instructions: When you gain an Action card, +1 Villager.

name: Acting Troupe
instructions:
+4 Villagers
Trash this.

name: Barracks
instructions: At the start of your turn, +1 Action.

name: Border Guard
instructions:
+1 Action
Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the other. If both were Actions, take the Lantern or Horn.

name: Canal
instructions: During your turns, cards cost $1 less.

name: Capitalism
instructions: During your turns, Actions with +$ amounts in their text are also Treasures.

name: Cargo Ship
instructions:
+$2
Once this turn, when you gain a card, you may set it aside face up (on this). At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Cathedral
instructions: At the start of your turn, trash a card from your hand.

name: Citadel
instructions: The first time you play an Action card during each of your turns, replay it afterwards.

name: City Gate
instructions: At the start of your turn, +1 Card, then put a card from your hand onto your deck.

name: Crop Rotation
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may discard a Victory card for +2 Cards.

name: Ducat
instructions:
+1 Coffers
+1 Buy
-----
When you gain this, you may trash a Copper from your hand.

name: Experiment
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
Return this to its pile.
-----
When you gain this, gain another Experiment (that doesn't come with another).

name: Exploration
instructions: At the end of your Buy phase, if you didn't gain any cards during it, +1 Coffers and +1 Villager.

name: Fair
instructions: At the start of your turn, +1 Buy.

name: Flag
instructions: When drawing your hand, +1 Card.

name: Flag Bearer
instructions:
+$2
-----
When you gain or trash this, take the Flag.

name: Fleet
instructions: After the game ends, there's an extra round of turns just for players with this.

name: Guildhall
instructions: When you gain a Treasure, +1 Coffers.

name: Hideout
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Victory card, gain a Curse.

name: Horn
instructions: Once per turn, when you discard a Border Guard from play, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Improve
instructions:
+$2
At the start of Clean-up, you may trash an Action card you would discard from play this turn, to gain a card costing exactly $1 more than it.

name: Innovation
instructions: Once during each of your turns, when you gain an Action card, you may play it.

name: Inventor
instructions: Gain a card costing up to $4, then cards cost $1 less this turn.

name: Key
instructions: At the start of your turn, +$1.

name: Lackeys
instructions:
+2 Cards
-----
When you gain this, +2 Villagers.

name: Lantern
instructions: Border Guards you play reveal 3 cards and discard 2. (It takes all 3 being Actions to take the Horn.)

name: Mountain Village
instructions:
+2 Actions
Look through your discard pile and put a card from it into your hand; if you can't, +1 Card.

name: Old Witch
instructions:
+3 Cards
Each other player gains a Curse and may trash a Curse from their hand.

name: Pageant
instructions: At the end of your Buy phase, you may pay $1 for +1 Coffers.

name: Patron
instructions:
+1 Villager
+$2
-----
When something causes you to reveal this (using the word "reveal") in an Action phase, +1 Coffers.

name: Piazza
instructions: At the start of your turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.

name: Priest
instructions:
+$2
Trash a card from your hand. For the rest of this turn, when you trash a card, +$2.

name: Recruiter
instructions:
+2 Cards
Trash a card from your hand. +1 Villager per $1 it costs.

name: Research
instructions:
+1 Action
Trash a card from your hand. Per $1 it costs, set aside a card from your deck face down (on this). At the start of your next turn, put those cards into your hand.

name: Road Network
instructions: When another player gains a Victory card, +1 Card.

name: Scepter
instructions: Choose one: +$2; or replay a non-Command Action card you played this turn that's still in play.

name: Scholar
instructions: Discard your hand. +7 Cards.

name: Sculptor
instructions: Gain a card to your hand costing up to $4. If it's a Treasure, +1 Villager.

name: Seer
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the ones costing from $2 to $4 into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Sewers
instructions: When you trash a card other than with this, you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Silk Merchant
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Buy
-----
When you gain or trash this, +1 Coffers and +1 Villager.

name: Silos
instructions: At the start of your turn, discard any number of Coppers, revealed, and draw that many cards.

name: Sinister Plot
instructions: At the start of your turn, add a token here, or remove your tokens here for +1 Card each.

name: Spices
instructions:
$2
+1 Buy
-----
When you gain this, +2 Coffers.

name: Star Chart
instructions: When shuffling, you may pick one of the cards to go on top.

name: Swashbuckler
instructions:
+3 Cards
If your discard pile has any cards in it: +1 Coffers, then if you have at least 4 Coffers tokens, take the Treasure Chest.

name: Treasure Chest
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, gain a Gold.

name: Treasurer
instructions:
+$3
Choose one: Trash a Treasure from your hand; or gain a Treasure from the trash to your hand; or take the Key.

name: Villain
instructions:
+2 Coffers
Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards one costing $2 or more (or reveals they can't).
